text.title: Work Breakdown Structure Worked Example
text.summary: One complete `WBS` spec for an e-commerce MVP showing all six overhead branches, balanced depth, and a full Dictionary entry.

example.title: E-commerce MVP — 7 L1 branches
example.code:
{ "project": "ecom-mvp", "version": "1.0", "items": [ {"id": "1", "name": "Project Management", "level": 1, "kind": "deliverable", "parent": null, "weight_pct": 12}, {"id": "1.1", "name": "Planning Documentation", "level": 2, "kind": "work_package", "parent": "1", "weight_pct": 40}, {"id": "1.2", "name": "Status Reporting", "level": 2, "kind": "work_package", "parent": "1", "weight_pct": 30}, {"id": "1.3", "name": "Risk Management", "level": 2, "kind": "work_package", "parent": "1", "weight_pct": 30},
{"id": "2", "name": "User Management Module", "level": 1, "kind": "deliverable", "parent": null, "weight_pct": 18}, {"id": "2.1", "name": "Registration System", "level": 2, "kind": "work_package", "parent": "2", "weight_pct": 35}, {"id": "2.2", "name": "Login / Logout", "level": 2, "kind": "work_package", "parent": "2", "weight_pct": 35}, {"id": "2.3", "name": "Profile Management", "level": 2, "kind": "work_package", "parent": "2", "weight_pct": 30},
{"id": "3", "name": "Product Catalog Module", "level": 1, "kind": "deliverable", "parent": null, "weight_pct": 22}, {"id": "3.1", "name": "Product Database", "level": 2, "kind": "work_package", "parent": "3", "weight_pct": 40}, {"id": "3.2", "name": "Search Functionality", "level": 2, "kind": "work_package", "parent": "3", "weight_pct": 35}, {"id": "3.3", "name": "Category Navigation", "level": 2, "kind": "work_package", "parent": "3", "weight_pct": 25},
{"id": "4", "name": "Quality Assurance", "level": 1, "kind": "deliverable", "parent": null, "weight_pct": 14}, {"id": "5", "name": "Deployment", "level": 1, "kind": "deliverable", "parent": null, "weight_pct": 10}, {"id": "6", "name": "Documentation", "level": 1, "kind": "deliverable", "parent": null, "weight_pct": 9}, {"id": "7", "name": "Training", "level": 1, "kind": "deliverable", "parent": null, "weight_pct": 7}, {"id": "8", "name": "Transition", "level": 1, "kind": "deliverable", "parent": null, "weight_pct": 8} ], "dictionary": [ {"id": "3.2", "name": "Search Functionality", "description": {"included": "Full-text search across products; relevance ranking", "excluded": "Faceted filters; voice search; recommendation engine"}, "deliverable": "Working search endpoint + UI component", "acceptance_criteria": [ "Returns relevant results in < 2s for 10k product catalogue", "Top-5 NDCG >= 0.85 against the eval set", "Empty-state and zero-result UI states present" ], "owner": "Backend Team Lead", "effort_hours": 40, "dependencies": ["3.1"]} ] }
example.note: All seven L1 items are nouns; L1 weight sums to 100; mandatory overhead branches present; balanced L2 depth across decomposed branches; sample Dictionary entry has included/excluded scope + 3 testable AC + named owner role + 40h leaf + dependency on 3.1.
